data.title: U.S. and Iran Reach Preliminary Agreement to Extend Ceasefire
data.description: Negotiators have made progress in extending the ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran, according to BlockBeats. On April 15, regional officials announced that both nations have reached a 'principled agreement' to facilitate further diplomatic negotiations. This development aims to create a conducive environment for ongoing discussions and potential resolutions.

data.title: Bitcoin's Long-Term Appeal Amid IMF's Global Debt Projection
data.description: According to NS3.AI, a recent commentary highlights the International Monetary Fund's (IMF) projection that global public debt could near 100% of GDP by 2029, suggesting a potential boost to Bitcoin's long-term attractiveness. The analysis contrasts this perspective with the risk posed by rising bond yields, which may increase the opportunity cost of holding non-yielding assets like Bitcoin. As bond yields climb, investors might face greater pressure to reconsider their positions in cryptocurrencies, weighing the benefits of traditional investments against the allure of digital assets.

data.title: Binance to Launch Tria Trading Competition with Token Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce the Tria Trading Competition on Binance Alpha, offering participants the chance to earn exclusive token rewards. The competition will be conducted in two separate promotion periods. The first period is scheduled from 2026-04-15 13:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-22 13:00 (UTC), followed by the second period from 2026-04-22 13:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-29 13:00 (UTC). Participants will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of TRIA tokens during each period. The top 2,000 users in each period will share a total of 3,600,000 TRIA tokens, with each eligible participant receiving 1,800 TRIA tokens.

The competition is open to users trading via Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha, with third-party dApp transactions excluded. Only cumulative purchases will count towards the competition, and there are no volume caps for participants. Token bridging transactions are not eligible, and trading volume from Alpha-to-Alpha token pairs will not be counted towards Alpha Points or competition rankings. Rewards will be distributed in TRIA tokens and will be claimable by eligible users before 2026-05-13 13:00:00 (UTC). Users must claim their rewards within 14 days of them becoming available, or they will be forfeited.

To participate, users must click [Join] on the Binance App event page, ensuring their trading volume is counted. Participants are required to update their Binance App to the latest version and create a Binance Wallet (Keyless). The terms and conditions of the promotion govern user participation, and Binance reserves the right to amend or cancel the activity at its discretion. Users are advised to review the Terms of Use and Risk Warning before participating.

data.title: S&P 500 Nears Record High Amid Market Rebound
data.description: The S&P 500 index approached within 0.5% of its January 2026 record high of 7,002, following a market rebound that has added nearly $6 trillion in value since March 30. According to NS3.AI, the Kobeissi Letter reported a significant decrease in hedge fund short exposure to U.S. ETFs over five trading days, as previously sidelined capital returned to stocks. Global Markets Investor highlighted that the Buffett Indicator reached a record 232.6%, indicating stretched valuations despite the ongoing strong market momentum.

data.title: Iran Threatens to Halt Trade in Key Waterways Amid U.S. Maritime Blockade
data.description: An Iranian military spokesperson has announced that Iran will prevent import and export activities in the Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and Red Sea if the United States persists with its maritime blockade. According to NS3.AI, the spokesperson emphasized that ongoing U.S. actions pose a threat to the safety of Iranian merchant ships and oil tankers.

data.title: Bank of America Exceeds Expectations with Q1 Stock Trading Revenue
data.description: Bank of America reported its first-quarter stock trading revenue, excluding DVA, at $2.83 billion. According to Jin10, this figure surpassed market expectations, which were set at $2.51 billion.

data.title: Associated Press: Mediators have made progress in extending the ceasefire agreement between the US and Iran and restarting negotiations.
data.description: According to the Associated Press: Mediators have made progress in extending the ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran and restarting negotiations. Regional officials said on Wednesday that the United States and Iran have reached an "agreement in principle" to create conditions for further diplomatic mediation. (Jinshi)

data.title: eToro CEO: Bought 4,000 BTC at approximately $5 each between 2011 and 2012, and sold them when their value reached $50 million.
data.description: eToro CEO Yoni Assia stated on @parisblockweek that eToro bought BTC at approximately $5 per BTC between 2011 and 2012, accumulating a total holding of 4,000 BTC, before selling the position when its value reached $50 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Pacific Investment Management CIO: Secondary Inflation Effects from Rising Oil Prices Unlikely to Manifest
data.description: The Chief Investment Officer of Global Fixed Income at Pacific Investment Management Company has expressed skepticism regarding the emergence of secondary inflation effects due to soaring oil prices. According to Jin10, the CIO noted that while oil prices have surged, the anticipated inflationary impact may not materialize as expected. Additionally, the company plans to closely monitor the extent of any fiscal intervention measures that may be implemented.

data.title: Compass Announces Share Transfer Plan by Major Shareholder
data.description: On April 15, Jin10 reported that Compass has announced a plan by its major shareholder, Guangzhou Zhanxin Communication Technology Co., Ltd., to transfer 24,391,677 shares, representing 4% of the company's total share capital, through an inquiry transfer method. According to Jin10, the transfer will not be conducted through centralized bidding or block trading, and the transferee will be institutional investors with the necessary capabilities. The allocated shares cannot be transferred within six months after acquisition. The minimum transfer price is set at no less than 70% of the average stock trading price over the 20 trading days preceding the subscription invitation. The seller stated that the funds from this transfer will be used to subscribe to the company's proposed non-public issuance of perpetual corporate bonds, repay stock pledge funds, and support the company's business development. This transfer will not result in a change of control for the company.

data.title: Iranian military responds to US naval blockade
data.description: A spokesman for the central headquarters of the Iranian Armed Forces in Hatem-Anbia stated on the 15th that if the United States continues its maritime blockade, causing insecurity for Iranian merchant ships and oil tankers, then the Iranian armed forces will not allow any import or export activities to continue in the Persian Gulf, the Gulf of Oman, and the Red Sea. (Xinhua)

data.title: Trump Discusses Letter Exchange with Xi Amid Concerns Over Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump revealed that he has exchanged letters with Chinese President Xi Jinping. Bloomberg posted on X that the correspondence appears to be driven by worries regarding China's potential provision of weapons to Iran. The exchange highlights ongoing geopolitical tensions and the complexities of international relations involving the U.S., China, and Iran.

data.title: EU Antitrust Raids Target Nutella Maker Ferrero
data.description: Ferrero, the renowned manufacturer of the popular chocolate-hazelnut spread Nutella, faced antitrust raids by the European Union this week. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the EU's ongoing efforts to investigate potential anti-competitive practices within the food industry. The raids are part of a broader initiative by the EU to ensure fair competition and prevent monopolistic behavior among major food producers. Ferrero, known for its iconic products, has been under scrutiny as regulators aim to maintain market balance and protect consumer interests. The company has yet to comment on the specifics of the investigation or its potential implications.

data.title: TeraWulf's $900 Million Stock Offering Impacts Share Price
data.description: TeraWulf has announced an upsized $900 million common stock offering to finance its planned data center campus in Hawesville, Kentucky. According to NS3.AI, the company's shares experienced a decline of approximately 6%, settling at $19.70 in pre-market trading following the pricing announcement. The net proceeds from this offering are intended to repay outstanding amounts under TeraWulf's bridge credit facility. The company anticipates first-quarter revenue to be between $30 million and $35 million, with an adjusted EBITDA of up to $3 million.

data.title: Potential IPOs May Impact Bitcoin Liquidity
data.description: SpaceX, OpenAI, and Anthropic are projected to require between $104 billion and $197 billion in IPO capital this year, according to BloFin Research. This substantial demand could create a short-term liquidity strain on Bitcoin and other risk assets. According to NS3.AI, Bitcoin might remain within a specific price range during peak issuance periods. However, it could potentially benefit if liquidity, post-lockup, is redirected into speculative assets.

data.title: Trader Utilizes High Leverage for Bitcoin and Ethereum Investments
data.description: A trader has once again employed a 20x leverage strategy to go long on 269 BTC and 8,586 ETH. According to Odaily, the total value of these investments is $19.92 million each. Over the past two months, this trader has executed 47 transactions, achieving a success rate of 63.83% and generating a total profit of $5.17 million.

data.title: Trader 0x049b Opens High-Leverage Positions in BTC and ETH
data.description: A trader identified as 0x049b has reportedly opened new positions with 20x leverage, acquiring 269 BTC and 8,586 ETH. According to ChainCatcher, this move follows a series of 47 trades over the past two months, during which the trader achieved a success rate of 63.83% and accumulated total profits of approximately $5.17 million.

data.title: Bitcoin Retail Demand May Rise with Larger Tax Refunds and New IRS Reporting Rules
data.description: Larger tax refunds and new IRS cryptocurrency reporting rules could potentially boost Bitcoin retail demand during this tax season. According to NS3.AI, IRS data revealed that refunds totaled $241.7 billion by April 3. MarketWatch noted that the average refund amounted to approximately $3,521. The report also mentioned that slower filings were partly due to late-arriving forms and cryptocurrency paperwork.

data.title: The Iranian military warned the United States against continuing its naval blockade.
data.description: According to market sources, the Iranian military warned the United States against continuing its maritime blockade, stating that a continued blockade would undermine the ceasefire. If the blockade continues, Iran will not allow the movement of goods into or out of the Gulf region.

data.title: A Satoshi Nakamoto-era Bitcoin OG, holding $135.6 million worth of BTC, transferred 1,000 BTC.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a Bitcoin OG from the Satoshi era has transferred 1,000 BTC, worth $74.03 million, to two newly created wallets, possibly in preparation for a sale. These wallets currently hold 1,833 BTC, worth $135.6 million.
